sources.quote: These open or open-weight models have good OpenHands Index scores or are recommended for local OpenHands setups: GLM-5.1 `openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.1` Strongest open-weight result currently listed in the OpenHands Index. Kimi-K2.6 `openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6` Strong open-weight option. DeepSeek-V4-Pro `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` Strong coding and test-generation scores. MiniMax-M2.7 `openrouter/minimax/minimax-m2.7` Recommended as a lower-cost open-weight option. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B `openai/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B` Recommended local / self-hosted model for OpenHands.

sources.title: Jan model management
sources.quote: Jan supports connecting to various AI cloud providers. Go to Settings > Model Providers, select your provider, and enter your API key. OpenAI Use GPT-4o, o3, and other OpenAI models. Anthropic Use Claude models from Anthropic. Google Use Gemini models from Google. Groq Fast inference for open-source models. Mistral Use Mistral AI models. OpenRouter Access hundreds of models via a single API.

sources.title: AnythingLLM README

sources.title: GPT-5.5 in ChatGPT
sources.quote: GPT-5.5 Instant in ChatGPT is the default for all logged-in users, and a single auto-switching system that brings together the best of our models into a smart, fast single experience. You can also choose the model directly from the model picker: Instant — fast responses for everyday questions (GPT-5.5 Instant); Thinking — deeper reasoning for more complex tasks (GPT-5.5 Thinking); Pro — research-grade intelligence (GPT-5.5 Pro).

sources.title: OpenHands LLM overview
sources.quote: These open or open-weight models have good OpenHands Index scores or are recommended for local OpenHands setups: GLM-5.1 `openrouter/z-ai/glm-5.1` Strongest open-weight result currently listed in the OpenHands Index. Kimi-K2.6 `openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.6` Strong open-weight option. DeepSeek-V4-Pro `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` Strong coding and test-generation scores. MiniMax-M2.7 `openrouter/minimax/minimax-m2.7` Recommended as a lower-cost open-weight option. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B `openai/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B` Recommended local / self-hosted model for OpenHands.
